next_action_templates.authority: Map approval chain and convert ask to authority-compliant decision packet.
next_action_templates.capital_control: Define capital stack owner, tranche path, and deployability conditions.
next_action_templates.mandate_alignment: Produce mandate-bridge narrative with precedent and downside protection.
next_action_templates.urgency_pressure: Create time-bound pressure memo with trigger events and consequence window.
next_action_templates.risk_perception: Issue risk-compression brief with mitigation owners and proof artifacts.
next_action_templates.trust_access: Open direct path to seat via strongest warm conduit and credibility proof.
next_action_templates.decision_clarity: Rewrite ask into binary mandate decision with explicit yes/no threshold.
next_action_templates.dependency_risk: Build alternate-seat plan with at least one validated substitute path.
